source_pr.title: statistics: fix unstable TestAnalyzeGlobalStatsWithOpts2
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: yisaer <disxiaofei@163.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #37647 

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Fix the unstable data distribution

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Global/session state interference: auto-analyze/persist options affect statistics handle tests.
failure_signature: Statistics tests affected by global tidb_enable_auto_analyze / persist_analyze_options state.
root_cause_explanation: The test relied on global statistics-related variables (e.g., tidb_enable_auto_analyze, tidb_persist_analyze_options). If other tests mutate these globals, the test becomes flaky. The fix explicitly sets the needed globals and restores them after the test.
fix_pattern: Save/restore global variables and set required values explicitly within tests.
analysis:
PR title: statistics: fix unstable TestAnalyzeGlobalStatsWithOpts2
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/37705

Triage summary: statistics: fix unstable TestAnalyzeGlobalStatsWithOpts2
Changed files (1): statistics/handle/handle_test.go
Patch url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/37705.patch
Picked test: type=unit path=statistics/handle/handle_test.go name=TestAnalyzeGlobalStatsWithOpts2
